rag_rules: AGREE assumptions and guarantees for component ports must be placed in component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use helper declarations to align assumed types with actual types in comparisons
generic_rules: AGREE contracts should reference valid component ports and variables
Use boolean helper declarations for range checks in assumptions and guarantees
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Assumptions and guarantees must be scoped to component types when referencing ports
Helper declarations for range checks should use bool type with comparison expressions
anti_patterns: Avoid placing port-based contracts in implementation scopes
Do not mismatch helper declaration types with expression types
